title: ABB India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: ABB India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
ABB India International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
